aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical areas for improvement. The website has relevant content and schema markup but lacks reviews and local citations.
quick_wins: Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search visibility.
Expand local citation listings on platforms like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local directories.
Optimize meta tags and headings with targeted keywords related to plumbing and HVAC services in Marietta, GA.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile (GBP) has not been claimed or optimized. Basic information like the business name and contact details are present on the website but not in a GBP.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.
Incomplete business information and absence of photos or service listings.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across local directories and platforms. This inconsistency affects local search visibility.
action_items: Claim and verify the business on Google Business Profile.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms and directories.
List the business on high-authority local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce websites.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for plumbing and HVAC services in Marietta, GA
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Claiming and optimizing Google Business Profile and encouraging customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building local citations and backlinks from local business associations and industry-related websites
